shape.prop:
What is an LLM, really?

A 60-second vertical explainer that demystifies large language models for total beginners. One idea, one metaphor, zero jargon.

Hook · 0–3s

"You've used AI today and didn't notice."

Fast-cut montage: autocomplete, search, voice assistant.

Script beats

  • It's autocomplete on steroids
  • Trained on a huge slice of the internet
  • Predicts the next word, over and over
  • That's it — no magic, just patterns

Visuals

  1. Phone keyboard suggestion bar (screen recording)
  2. Animated "word by word" build
  3. Simple node diagram, brand blue

CTA

"Follow for the version that explains how it goes wrong."
